title: Surveillance of typhoid fever - Canada.ca
content:
## Surveillance of typhoid fever
Learn about typhoid fever surveillance.
- Number of cases of typhoid fever in Canada
- How Canada monitors cases of typhoid fever

## Number of cases of typhoid fever in Canada
In Canada, where most cases occur in travellers, there was an average of 140 cases of typhoid fever between 2011 and 2016.

## How Canada monitors cases of typhoid fever
Typhoid fever is a nationally notifiable disease in all provinces and territories.
Cases are reported to:
- provincial or territorial departments of health
- the federal government, if they meet the national case definition
- Cases that meet the national case definition are reported through the Canadian Notifiable Disease Surveillance System .
